---
id: list-identity-sessions
title: "List an Identity's Sessions"
description: "This endpoint returns all sessions that belong to the given Identity."

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"List an Identity's Sessions"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/admin/identities/{id}/sessions"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint returns all sessions that belong to the given Identity.
